_comment_setup: Copy this file to .claude/settings.json in the generated business repo root.
PREREQUISITES
jq: must be on PATH (brew install jq / apt install jq). Without jq every
hook prints a WARN line to stderr and exits 0 (inactive but loud).
SKILL_ROOT: must be set to the absolute path of the installed
b2c-mobile-business-launch skill directory (e.g.
~/.codex/skills/b2c-mobile-business-launch or wherever the skill is
installed). Without SKILL_ROOT the hooks fall back to '.' which only works
when the business repo IS the skill root (local dev). In all other cases
the hooks print a WARN line to stderr and exit 0 instead of failing
silently. Set via: export SKILL_ROOT=/path/to/skill (or .env.local).
BLOCKING vs ADVISORY
Hooks that affect lane-coverage and store-screenshots at 'done' are
BLOCKING (no '|| true') -- a real failure surfaces as a hook error and the
agent turn is interrupted. All other validators are ADVISORY ('|| true') --
they print warnings but do not stop the agent.
PRODUCER != VERIFIER -- SEPARATE GRADING PASS (screenshot rubric)
After final PNGs are written, the 'Final PNG hook' below emits a BLOCKING
signal that routes the grade step to a separate agent/session. The signal
exits non-zero so the agent sees the instruction as a hard requirement, not
just advisory text. The grader MUST be a different agent/session than the
builder. The grade-screenshots.ts scaffold emits the grading task template
and validates the assembled ledger before writing screenshot-rubric-scores.json.
store_console CANNOT be marked done until a validated separate-pass ledger exists.
Command: npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml
HONEST LIMIT: The validator enforces distinct session_id values and
grading_pass.separate_pass=true, but cannot prove two truly independent
processes ran. Founder approval is the ultimate backstop.
The Bash hook also intercepts final PNG writes via Bash write verbs (cp, mv,
tee, install, ditto, sips, magick/convert, or shell redirection > / >>
targeting screenshots/final/*.png) and emits the same BLOCKING signal.
Honest limit: a crafted command string could evade the regex pattern.
Founder review remains the ultimate backstop.

PostToolUse._comment: Write/Edit hook: fires depth-check validators automatically after every relevant artifact write.

hooks.command: if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'WARN [b2c-mobile-business-launch hooks]: jq is not on PATH; depth-check and screenshot-grading hooks are INACTIVE until jq is installed (brew install jq / apt install jq).' >&2; exit 0; fi; if [ -z "$SKILL_ROOT" ] && [ ! -f "./scripts/run-audit.ts" ]; then echo 'WARN [b2c-mobile-business-launch hooks]: SKILL_ROOT is not set; validator hooks cannot resolve the installed skill and are INACTIVE. export SKILL_ROOT=/path/to/installed/b2c-mobile-business-launch.' >&2; exit 0; fi; f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *SCREENSHOTS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; *PROJECT_STATE.yaml*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:lane-coverage -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; *ANALYTICS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:attribution -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *REVENUE_OPS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:revenue -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *EMAIL_OPS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:email -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *SPEC.md*|*APP_STORE_LISTING.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:aso-metadata -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *SECRETS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:secrets -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *TOOL_DECISIONS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:paid-tool-decisions -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *LOCALIZATION_MARKET_RESEARCH.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:localization-research -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *screenshot-rubric-scores.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *revenuecat-proof.json*|*posthog-proof.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:provider-proof -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; esac

PostToolUse._comment: Bash hook: (1) catches proof artifacts written via touch/echo/tee/bash redirection -- complements the Write|Edit hook above; (2) intercepts final PNG writes via Bash write verbs (cp, mv, tee, install, ditto, sips, magick/convert, or shell redirection > / >> targeting screenshots/final/*.png) and emits the BLOCKING grading-pass signal identical to the Write|Edit Final PNG hook below. Regex intent: match write-verb or redirection constructs whose destination lands in screenshots/final/*.png; read-only verbs (ls, cat, grep, find) never match because they do not appear as write-verb tokens. Honest limit: a carefully crafted command could evade the regex; founder review is the backstop.

hooks.command: if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'WARN [b2c-mobile-business-launch hooks]: jq is not on PATH; depth-check and screenshot-grading hooks are INACTIVE until jq is installed (brew install jq / apt install jq).' >&2; exit 0; fi; cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$cmd" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "(^|;|[&][&]|[|][|])[[:space:]]*(cp|mv|tee|install|ditto|sips|magick|convert)[[:space:]][^;]*screenshots/final/[^;]*[.]png|[>][>]?[[:space:]]*screenshots/final/[^[:space:]]*[.]png"; then echo ''; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'BLOCKING: PRODUCER != VERIFIER -- SEPARATE GRADING PASS REQUIRED'; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'A final screenshot PNG was written via Bash. You MUST run the grading'; echo 'pass as a SEPARATE agent or session before marking store_console done.'; echo ''; echo 'The grader MUST NOT be the same agent/session that built the PNGs.'; echo 'The validator (check:store-screenshots) will ERROR if:'; echo '  - grading_pass.separate_pass is not true in screenshot-rubric-scores.json'; echo '  - builder.session_id equals grader.session_id'; echo '  - any slot is missing grader_notes or observed_evidence'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 1 -- Generate the grading task template (run in THIS repo):'; echo '  npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 2 -- Open a NEW grader session (different agent/session_id).'; echo '  Provide the task template + final PNGs to the grader agent.'; echo '  The grader reads each PNG and fills in dimensions + observed_evidence.'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 3 -- Validate and write the ledger:'; echo '  npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml --grading-input /tmp/grading-output.json --write screenshot-rubric-scores.json'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 4 -- Verify the full rubric check passes:'; echo "  npm run --prefix ${SKILL_ROOT:-.} check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml"; echo ''; echo 'store_console CANNOT be marked done until all four steps complete.'; echo '=========================================================='; echo ''; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "$SKILL_ROOT" ] && [ ! -f "./scripts/run-audit.ts" ]; then echo 'WARN [b2c-mobile-business-launch hooks]: SKILL_ROOT is not set; validator hooks cannot resolve the installed skill and are INACTIVE. export SKILL_ROOT=/path/to/installed/b2c-mobile-business-launch.' >&2; exit 0; fi; case "$cmd" in *revenuecat-proof.json*|*posthog-proof.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:provider-proof -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *screenshot-rubric-scores.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *PROJECT_STATE.yaml*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:lane-coverage -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; esac

PostToolUse._comment: Final PNG hook (BLOCKING): after any final screenshot PNG is written via the Write or Edit tool, routes to the SEPARATE grading pass and exits non-zero so the agent sees it as a hard requirement. store_console CANNOT be marked done until a separate-pass ledger exists. PREREQUISITES: jq on PATH; SKILL_ROOT set to skill root so npx resolves. The hook prints the exact grade-screenshots.ts command to run.

hooks.command: if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'WARN [b2c-mobile-business-launch hooks]: jq is not on PATH; depth-check and screenshot-grading hooks are INACTIVE until jq is installed (brew install jq / apt install jq).' >&2; exit 0; fi; f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *screenshots/final/*.png) echo ''; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'BLOCKING: PRODUCER != VERIFIER -- SEPARATE GRADING PASS REQUIRED'; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'A final screenshot PNG was just written. You MUST run the grading'; echo 'pass as a SEPARATE agent or session before marking store_console done.'; echo ''; echo 'The grader MUST NOT be the same agent/session that built the PNGs.'; echo 'The validator (check:store-screenshots) will ERROR if:'; echo '  - grading_pass.separate_pass is not true in screenshot-rubric-scores.json'; echo '  - builder.session_id equals grader.session_id'; echo '  - any slot is missing grader_notes or observed_evidence'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 1 -- Generate the grading task template (run in THIS repo):'; echo '  npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 2 -- Open a NEW grader session (different agent/session_id).'; echo '  Provide the task template + final PNGs to the grader agent.'; echo '  The grader reads each PNG and fills in dimensions + observed_evidence.'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 3 -- Validate and write the ledger:'; echo '  npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml --grading-input /tmp/grading-output.json --write screenshot-rubric-scores.json'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 4 -- Verify the full rubric check passes:'; echo "  npm run --prefix ${SKILL_ROOT:-.} check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml"; echo ''; echo 'store_console CANNOT be marked done until all four steps complete.'; echo '=========================================================='; echo ''; exit 1 ;; esac
